So this is, views are kind of different.
So what we're measuring against is sessions and engaged sessions.
So a session is basically whenever somebody lands on the page.
An engaged session is if somebody spends at least 10 seconds on the page or they click onto a different link on your website.
So either one of those things happening or both happen, that's an engaged session.
The benchmark for an engaged session is usually 50%.
So if your engaged sessions are at least 50% and above of your overall sessions, we're doing pretty well.
So that seems to be the case here.
You know, we're a little below...
50%, but, you know, I do expect that to increase over time.
And then, yeah, so a view is something else.
A view is basically, like, it's dependent on the user.
So at me, as one person, I can view the same page twice within one session.
So that would show up as one session and two views.
So we feel like if Top Funnel is the goal, maybe measuring sessions is a better option over here.
